entities.name: stakeholder
entities.context: a person or group that has an interest in the organization or industry

entities.name: strategy
entities.context: a plan of action for achieving an organization's goals

entities.name: priorities
entities.context: the important issues or areas of focus for an organization

entities.name: decision-making
entities.context: the process of making choices among alternatives

entities.name: trends
entities.context: general directions in which something is developing or changing within an industry

entities.name: competitive dynamics
entities.context: the behavior and actions of competing organizations

entities.name: emerging patterns
entities.context: new and developing trends or behaviors in an industry

entities.name: market shifts
entities.context: changes in the market's demand or supply conditions

entities.name: decision criteria
entities.context: the standards or principles that stakeholders use to make decisions

entities.name: common objections
entities.context: frequent points of resistance or concern raised by stakeholders

entities.name: buying patterns
entities.context: the habits or tendencies of stakeholders when purchasing products or services
